violations.text: The area behind the oven, and above the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust clumps. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Hamburgers observed held at 110-112 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hamburgers were reheated. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Employee observed preparing hamburgers on an unclean surface (bun bags on counter). Food must be prepared on cleaned and sanitized surfaces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
One 4-door refrigerator was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. Refrigerator must be repaired, replaced, or removed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
The handwashing sink in the back area is in poor repair, hot water not working. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest-Guard PCS, last date of service 8/6/2024. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
